SortedCompanyContact
Company · Contact

Talk to us.

No automated triage, no AI chatbot, no "your call is important to us". A small team reads every email and gets back within a business day. Usually faster.

By topic.

Support

Something broken or weird?

Email hello@sortedaud.app with a description and a screenshot. Most replies under 4 business hours.

Press

Working on a story?

Email press@sortedaud.app. Brand kit, founder bios, and quick facts on the press page.

Careers

Want to work here?

Open roles on the careers page. Or email jobs@sortedaud.app with a 1-page note about you.

Partnerships & integrations

Got an integration in mind?

Email partners@sortedaud.app with a brief on what you're building.

Or just write.

Response time: Usually under 4 business hours. Always under 1 business day.

Or come visit.

Sorted Pty Ltd
Level 3, 100 Brunswick Street
Fortitude Valley QLD 4006
Australia

ABN 12 345 678 901
